---
title: "parquet_check"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-31"
---


```{r}
library(arrow)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
```
```{r}
parquet_dir <- "individual_book_train_parquet"
ds <- open_dataset(parquet_dir, format = "parquet")
```

```{r}
#Price not zero
price_errors <- ds %>%
  select(stock_id, bid_price1, ask_price1) %>%
  filter(bid_price1 <= 0 | ask_price1 <= 0 | bid_price1 >= ask_price1) %>%
  group_by(stock_id) %>%
  count() %>%
  collect()

print("Price Error:")
print(price_errors)
```
```{r}
#Size not zero
size_errors <- ds %>%
  select(stock_id, bid_size1, ask_size1) %>%
  filter((bid_size1 + ask_size1) == 0) %>%
  group_by(stock_id) %>%
  count() %>%
  collect()

print("Size error:")
print(size_errors)
```

```{r}
#N/A prescence ?
na_errors <- ds %>%
  filter(is.na(bid_price1) | is.na(ask_price1) | is.na(bid_size1) | is.na(ask_size1)) %>%
  group_by(stock_id) %>%
  count() %>%
  collect()

print("N/A:")
print(na_errors)
```

```{r}
#outliers in price (Both)?
ds %>% summarize(min_p = min(bid_price1), max_p = max(ask_price1)) %>% collect()
```
```{r}
#continous
#warning to self: takes at least 3 min at time of writing
stale_check <- ds %>%
  select(stock_id, time_id, bid_price1) %>%
  collect() %>%
  group_by(stock_id, time_id) %>%
  do({
    runs <- rle(.$bid_price1)
    data.frame(max_stale_secs = max(runs$lengths))
  }) %>%
  group_by(stock_id) %>%
  summarize(
    avg_max_stale = mean(max_stale_secs),
    absolute_max_stale = max(max_stale_secs)
  )

stale_check %>% arrange(desc(absolute_max_stale)) %>% head(10)

#ye [redacted] there might be a problem here
```
```{r}
#stock 31 seems very suspicious
density_vs_stale <- ds %>%
  group_by(stock_id, time_id) %>%
  summarize(
    num_rows = n(),
    max_s = max(seconds_in_bucket) - min(seconds_in_bucket)
  ) %>%
  collect() %>%
  group_by(stock_id) %>%
  summarize(
    avg_ticks_per_window = mean(num_rows),
    avg_time_coverage = mean(max_s)
  ) %>%
  left_join(stale_check, by = "stock_id")

density_vs_stale %>% arrange(desc(absolute_max_stale)) %>% head(10)
```
```{r}
#stock 31 was not as "flat-lined" as I thought
library(ggplot2)

sample_window <- ds %>%
  filter(stock_id == 31, time_id == 5)
  collect()

ggplot(sample_window, aes(x = seconds_in_bucket, y = bid_price1)) +
  geom_step(color = "steelblue", size = 1) +
  labs(title = "Stock",
       x = "Seconds_in_Bucket",
       y = "Bid_Price") +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
stock_life <- ds %>%
  filter(stock_id == 31) %>%
  group_by(time_id) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_price = mean(bid_price1),
    max_price = max(bid_price1),
    min_price = min(bid_price1)
  ) %>%
  collect() %>%
  arrange(time_id) %>%
  mutate(pseudo_time = row_number())

ggplot(stock_life, aes(x = pseudo_time)) +
  # The ribbon shows the 'wiggle room' in each 10-minute bucket
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = min_price, ymax = max_price), fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  # The line shows the general trend
  geom_line(aes(y = mean_price), color = "darkblue", size = 0.5) +
  labs(x = "Time_ID") +
  theme_minimal()
```
